title: Cinematic Cataclysm
description: Adds intro cutscenes to some L_Ender's Cataclysm bosses
body:
# About: This mod adds one-time-per-dungeon intro cutscenes to L_Ender's Cataclysm bosses. Players are invlulnerable and untargetable when cutscene is playing. Cutscenes will activate for every player nearby, but only the ones in survival mode will be teleported. ## Bosses that currently have intro cutscenes: Scylla, Maledictus, Leviathan, Ancient Remnant, Ignis

Important!

I) This mod heavily relies on some internal code of Cataclysm, if this code changes - cutscenes may break. II) If you are using EntityCulling mod, add these to entity tick culling whitelist: cinematiccataclysm:maledictus_cutscene cinematiccataclysm:scylla_cutscene cinematiccataclysm:ignis_cutscene cinematiccataclysm:ancient_remnant_cutscene cinematiccataclysm:leviathan_cutscene Not doing that may result in serious desyncrhonization between server and client, leading to cutscenes working incorrectly! III) For modpack makers: Cutscenes will work well only with Cataclysm structures, they won't work in your own structures, unless you design them with the cutscenes in mind
